title: thelypteris pseudoparasitica
intro: Thelypteris pseudoparasitica, also known as the Thelypteris fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris pseudoparasitica include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and even help manage fever. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions for internal use, and it can also be used topically as a poultice to treat skin conditions.
